mapper.sql: select e.id, e.task_id, t.task_no, t.task_name, e.study_instance_uid, e.series_instance_uid, e.sop_instance_uid, e.evaluator_user_id, u.user_name as evaluator_user_name, e.defect_type, e.defect_level, e.conclusion, e.annotation_json, e.evaluate_time, e.status, e.remark, e.create_by, e.create_time, e.update_by, e.update_time, e.del_flag from ndt_evaluation e left join ndt_inspection_task t on t.id = e.task_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = e.evaluator_user_id
mapper.insert: insert into ndt_evaluation (task_id, study_instance_uid, series_instance_uid, sop_instance_uid, evaluator_user_id, defect_type, defect_level, conclusion, annotation_json, evaluate_time, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag) values (#{taskId}, #{studyInstanceUid}, #{seriesInstanceUid}, #{sopInstanceUid}, #{evaluatorUserId}, #{defectType}, #{defectLevel}, #{conclusion}, #{annotationJson}, #{evaluateTime}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{delFlag})
mapper.update: update ndt_evaluation set study_instance_uid = #{studyInstanceUid}, series_instance_uid = #{seriesInstanceUid}, sop_instance_uid = #{sopInstanceUid}, evaluator_user_id = #{evaluatorUserId}, defect_type = #{defectType}, defect_level = #{defectLevel}, conclusion = #{conclusion}, annotation_json = #{annotationJson}, evaluate_time = #{evaluateTime}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), del_flag = #{delFlag} where id = #{id}
